chorus_farm.title: Build a Chorus Plant farm — collect Chorus Flowers, plant them in End Stone, grow full Chorus Trees

subtitle.text: Chorus Fruit teleports on eat. Popped Chorus is the key material for Purpur and End Rod. Farm both.

description: CH.13 · CHORUS FARM
▸ Chorus Plants are the only farmable crop in the End.
They grow on End Stone.
They drop Chorus Fruit and Chorus Flowers.
Chorus Fruit teleports you on eat (ignores walls).
Popped Chorus Fruit is a crafting material.
Both are essential for Ch13-15 progression.
◈ CHORUS FARM SETUP
└ Collect Chorus Flowers from the tips of trees
(the pink-white flower at the top of each branch)
└ Plant Chorus Flower on End Stone (only surface)
└ Grows: 1-4 blocks tall, multiple branches
└ Break any block in the tree: all blocks above drop
└ Farm design: plant in rows of 20+ for mass yield
└ Bonemeal: does NOT work on Chorus Plants
◈ CHORUS FRUIT USES
└ Eat: teleports 8 blocks in random direction (ignores walls)
Useful: End City navigation, escape from Shulker levitation
Risky: can teleport into walls/off ledges
└ Chorus Teleport: best mobility tool in End Cities
└ Food value: 4 hunger, 2.4 saturation (mediocre)
◈ POPPED CHORUS FRUIT
└ Smelt Chorus Fruit → Popped Chorus Fruit
└ Crafting uses:
4 Popped Chorus + 4 Ender Stone → End Rod (×4)
4 Popped Chorus + Purpur → Purpur Pillar, Bricks, Stairs
└ End Rod: light source + decoration in End-themed builds
└ Quantum Fluid: Chorus Fruit + Water (Mixer) → Quantum Fluid
(Create Teleporters — use your farm for teleporter fuel)
▸ The Chorus Plants grew before the End Cities.
The cities were built around the plants.
The Purpur blocks that make up the cities
are made from what the plants produce.
The plant is the city, one step back.
▶ Build a Chorus Plant farm [check]
▶ Collect 32 Chorus Fruit
◇ Chorus Fruit is the fuel for Create Teleporters
(Quantum Fluid = Chorus + Water in heated Mixer).
Your Chorus farm is your teleporter fuel supply.
Grow it large enough to be passive income.
